_comment: Understudy per-install preferences. Copy to config.json (gitignored) and edit, or let the guided setup (SETUP.md) write it. Absent file = these defaults. Paths/secrets live in .env, not here.
_default_sort_options: smart (Best) | new (Newest first) | old (Oldest first) — the dashboard's default ordering of 'in your court' projects
_health_days: days a project can sit in your court before its light turns: <move = green/active, <slip = amber/your-move, <stalled = orange/slipping, else red/stalled. Also drives which projects the nudge digest flags.
_nudge: enabled: whether nudge_digest.py posts. channel: chat channel (NUDGE_CHANNEL env overrides). lights: which staleness lights to nag about. cadence: cron expression the setup uses when offering to install a schedule.
